name: Cinematic Spline Tracking Shot
description: You are an Aerial Cinematographer tasked with programming a cinematic flight path for a rowing team using QGroundControl, based on the director's shot list at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/director_shot_list.txt. Create a mission plan that begins with a takeoff, sets the speed to 4 m/s, and pitches the gimbal to -15 degrees. The flight path must follow the five river coordinates from the shot list using spline waypoints (NAV_SPLINE_WAYPOINT) at an altitude of 25 meters to ensure smooth cinematic curves. Conclude the mission with a return-to-launch (RTL) command and save the final plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/river_tracking_shot.plan.
